rationale: Turn 1 correctly wakes up to repeated local-repair pressure and brakes the patch. Turn 2 keeps refusing the direct request to put fields under the chart and names the structural issue, so it is not an unconditional concession or direct patch. However, its emergency alternative only gestures at a temporary confirmed source for this management review; it does not visibly include the full required emergency contract, especially no baseline lift and a structural repair deadline. Because the loaded brake remains active but the emergency contract is incomplete, this earns partial credit.
